species: Single-shot top-down proteomics with capillary zone electrophoresis-electrospray ionization-tandem mass spectrometry for identification of nearly 600 Escherichia coli proteoforms
sample_source: We further applied the optimized CZE-MS/MS system for top-down proteomics of E.coli.
strain: the details for preparation of Escherichia coli (E.coli, strain K-12 substrain MG1655) samples are described in Supporting Information I.
